title: Preserve quoted comma parsing
prompt: Fix the CSV row parser so quoted commas remain inside fields. Preserve the public parse_row(text: str) -> list[str] API and avoid changing unrelated files.
hidden_tests_description: Nested escaped quotes and trailing empty fields are checked.
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No system-specific reward; ordinary parser maintenance task.
h0_risk_notes: A disciplined baseline can solve this with direct tests.
